[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 010000000 1
2 000000100 1
3 000100010 2
4 000010010 2
5 001110010 4
6 000101000 2
7 001010000 2

12 101000001 3
23 010100000 2
34 000000100 1 match 2
45 001000000 1

70 000101100 3
